title: Ekaii Plus
description: Optimization and QoL modpack designed to be used on Ekaii minecraft server
body:
![Ekaii Plus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de0f0e6558a080d1744453835e0589ec33d96b16.png)

-----------------

# Features

- Custom modpack for Ekaii server.
- Aimed to enhance Minecraft visual experience and optimize things to be runnable on most PCs.
- Designed and optimized for Ekaii MC Server.

Are you ready to join the adventure ?

# Who are we ?

Ekaii is a french vanilla server, running on a custom Paper fork. Our community is based on trust, that's why there is a whitelist on our vanilla server, and on our modded server. If you want to join, feel free to apply. However, communications are mainly in French.

# Useful links

[![](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/jn8jrvsMyK)](https://discord.gg/jn8jrvsMyK)

***Disclaimer** : The modpack is still in development and subject to changes.*
